design_concept: Luxury Enterprise AI (Dubai Elegance + Bangalore Tech)

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: mask-image to create shimmering border for the Elite pricing tier and AI assessment CTA

marketing.spacing: Generous sections py-24 md:py-32, gap-8 to gap-12

admin.spacing: Dense layout, p-4 to p-6, gap-4
admin.grid: High density, strict columns for data tables and kanban

components.name: Navigation
components.instructions: Sticky header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0E17]/70). Logo on left, links center, 'Admin Login' CTA right.

components.name: Hero Section
components.instructions: Full viewport height. Use hero_bg image with bg-[#0A0E17]/70 overlay. H1 Tagline: 'The Curated AI Marketplace Bridging Enterprises & Innovation'. Dual CTAs.

components.name: How It Works
components.instructions: Split layout. Left: Enterprises (Free, connect with vetted AI). Right: Providers (Paid membership, gain enterprise access).

components.name: Provider Tiers
components.instructions: 3 Cards: Starter ($500/yr), Growth ($1500/yr), Elite ($5000/yr). Add a glowing border/tracing beam effect to the Elite card to emphasize it.

components.name: AI Maturity Assessment
components.instructions: Dark container with subtle electric cyan glow. Interactive form (Shadcn Input/Select) culminating in a CTA 'Generate Report' (Mocked to simulate Ollama backend integration).

components.name: Featured Providers
components.instructions: Bento grid or marquee displaying mock AI providers with their specialized niches.

components.name: Founder & Trust
components.instructions: Left: founder_portrait (grayscale, high contrast). Right: Trust statement and 'Vetting Rubric' list with check icons.

components.name: Intake & Application Forms
components.instructions: Two distinct sections or dialogs. Enterprise Intake (needs, budget) and Provider Application (capabilities).

components.name: Footer
components.instructions: Large footer. Left: Dubai address + image. Right: Bangalore address + image. Muted text.

components.name: Admin Dashboard
components.instructions: Sidebar + Main content layout. 1. Stats Cards (Leads, Active Providers, Revenue). 2. Vetting Kanban Board (Columns: New, Assessing, Approved, Rejected). 3. Leads Pipeline Table. Use high density bento grid.

accessibility.guidelines: Ensure APCA contrast ratio. Add aria-labels to icon buttons. Include data-testid on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='tier-elite-btn'). Hover states must explicitly set text color.

motion.interactions: Buttons: scale 0.98 on tap. Cards: -translate-y-1 and shadow-lg on hover. Page entrance: staggered fade-in via framer-motion.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: yarn add framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge @phosphor-icons/react react-router-dom
IMPORTANT: You are working with .js files, NOT .tsx files. Use standard JS/JSX syntax.
Add fonts Playfair Display and Manrope via Google Fonts in index.html.
Implement the landing page at route '/' and admin dashboard at '/admin' using React Router.
For the AI backend integration, create a simulated Ollama text generation function (e.g., mock async response returning an 'AI Maturity Score').
Customize Shadcn components heavily to remove the default light/gray look. Apply #111827 backgrounds and gold/cyan accents.
CRITICAL: Do not use fully transparent backgrounds on nav/dropdowns. Always use solid or glass surfaces.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glassmorphism.
DO NOT apply transition: all globally. Add transitions to specific interactive elements.
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp) with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠💡) for icons. Use Phosphor or Lucide icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable (e.g., py-24).
NEVER use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com). Use the provided image_urls.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements to support testing.
